news.title: Wholesale prices rose 0.7% in February, much more than expected and up 3.4% annually
news.summary: Wholesale prices rose sharply in February, providing another sign that inflation continues to percolate. Even aside from rising energy prices, wholesale prices rose in February.

news.title: Israel says it has killed Iran’s intelligence minister in third assassination in two days
news.summary: Israel's Defense Forces say Iran's Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib was killed in a "targeted strike" in Tehran. Israel says the strike was carried out in response to the Iranian government's actions in Syria.

news.title: The Fed issues its latest interest rate decision Wednesday. Here's what to expect
news.summary: The Federal Reserve has little choice but to stay on the sidelines this week. The central bank is expected to keep interest rates at a record low.

news.title: Disney embarks on new chapter as Josh D'Amaro takes over as CEO
news.summary: Josh D'Amaro, who previously served as chairman of Disney's experiences division, takes over as CEO. Bob Iger is stepping aside as Disney's CEO.

news.title: Oil prices top $108 after Iran threatens oil facilities in Saudi Arabia, UAE and Qatar
news.summary: Oil prices rise as attacks on Middle East energy infrastructure escalate. Oil prices rose as attacks were carried out by militants in the Middle East. The attacks were aimed at energy infrastructure in the region.

news.title: Why is everything so expensive? America has a wage problem — not a price problem
news.summary: Cheap imports broke the middle class, and curbing inflation won’t fix the wage gap. “It’s not a question of if, but when,’’ says economist Andrew Keen.

news.title: ‘Never get out-hustled.’ ServiceNow’s CEO shares his best career advice.
news.summary: Bill McDermott says he was able to rise through the ranks at Xerox because he worked harder than the people around him. McDermott is now CEO of SAP and ServiceNow.

news.title: It’s a ‘black swan’ moment in oil but nowhere else. The stock market is at risk of a 20% fall, say these strategists.
news.summary: Almost everything except for bonds – stocks, interest rates, credit, gold and the U.S. dollar – is having “very normal white swan types of moves.”

news.title: It’s time to sell this fertilizer stock that’s been the S&P 500’s top gainer, analyst says
news.summary: Mizuho turned bearish on CF Industries’ stock, saying it has rallied too much since the Iran conflict started. Mizuho: CF Industries' stock has risen too much.

news.title: Oil prices climb after Iran reports attacks on key oil and natural gas field
news.summary: Iran says U.S. and Israeli airstrikes hit one of its key natural gas field. Nearby oil and petrochemical facilities also came under attack.
